comments.author: reviewer1
comments.body: Shouldn't this handle the case where `entry` is undefined? A cache miss would throw here.

reviewThreads.draft: Good catch — fixed in `abc1234`. `get()` now returns early on a cache miss instead of dereferencing `entry`.

comments.author: reviewer1
comments.body: Is the cache size configurable? I don't see it documented.

reviewThreads.draft: Yes — `cache.maxEntries` in the config (defaults to 1000, see `src/config.js:22`). I'll add it to the README in a follow-up if you'd like.

issueComments.draft:
